title: Project plan / OKR style
description: Goal-setting prose — OKRs, KPIs, milestones at speed
text: Q3 Objective: scale the platform to one million daily active users. Key results: 1) reduce signup friction to under sixty seconds; 2) ship onboarding v2 by August; 3) reach 70% activation among new accounts. Owner: Product. Status: on track. Risks: hiring delays, third-party API limits.

tips.text: OKR/KPI writing is the language of modern management
Numbered lists with colons have a steady rhythm — drill it

tips.text: Train this and you'll write any project plan faster than peers

tips.target: ship onboarding v2 by August; 3) reach 70% activation among new accounts. Owner: Product. Status: on track. Risks: hiring delays, third-party API limits.

character_tips.anna: Goal-setting at 84 WPM. This is the language of leadership.
character_tips.maxim: Every senior role writes OKRs. Speed here = strategic advantage.
character_tips.klavochka: Planning a beautiful future, my dear — structured and hopeful 🌟
